Environmental Electrical Engineering

I build sensing systems that converts behavior into usable engineering data.

This portfolio is structured as an evidence log for the ISM program. It tracks research outputs, weekly reports, and the progression from prototype to final product.

What Am I Doing

Program ISM, Wakeland High School
Build Focus Plant and soil sensing pipeline
Stage Prototype instrumentation + validation
Primary Outcome Cleaner decisions from reliable field data
